tracks.title: Rewst & n8n Reliability
tracks.focus: Make playbooks resilient with approvals, retries, and connector contract tests.
items: Harden error handling and idempotency across high-traffic automations.
Add contract tests for key connectors to catch vendor API drift early.
Ship reusable approval/notification components so new flows inherit governance.

tracks.title: Multi-cloud Automation Depth
tracks.focus: Broaden Azure/AWS coverage with IaC hygiene and identity automation.
items: Expand Bicep/Terraform modules with policy baselines for MSP tenants.
Instrument PowerShell/Python scripts with OpenTelemetry for success/failure rates.
Automate joiner/mover/leaver flows with Graph/Azure AD plus SaaS provisioning.

tracks.title: Observability & Runbooks
tracks.focus: Treat automations like services with SLOs, dashboards, and safe remediation.
items: Publish SLOs for critical automations and alert on error budgets.
Build centralized dashboards for automation success/failure and costs.
Codify common incident runbooks with one-click, audited execution.

certifications.title: Clean Automation Certified: Automation Engineer (Rewst, Jan 2025)
CCNA: Enterprise Networking, Security, and Automation (Jul 2022)

experiments: AI-assisted runbook suggestions with approvals and grounded context.
Connector smoke tests on schedules to detect API/auth changes early.
Cost and ROI scoring per playbook to prioritize automation backlog.

roadmap.impact: Tenant-safe automation catalog with approvals and reporting for service desk agents.
Centralize OpenTelemetry metrics for automation success/failure and latency.
Broaden Graph/Azure AD coverage for lifecycle + SaaS provisioning.
E2E tests and canary flows for critical orchestrations across tenants.
